boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED requires exact five-element match with source citations before execution.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-AST-081-P controls: all five elements (material, quantity band, facility, purchase order, hazard-control status) must be matched to exact source citations.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: PO-AST-081 excluded from critical term citation; hazard-control status in REL-AST-081 not proven as factual finding.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: REL-AST-081 references 'active cabinet/handler controls' but does not provide hazard-control status proof—only states controls exist. STD-AST-081-P requires hazard-control status before execution.

critical_features_preserved: Adjacent source not treated as exact source
final_answer: ESCALATE. The action boundary remains open because PO-AST-081 was excluded from the critical-term citation and the hazard-control status in REL-AST-081 is stated as a control descriptor rather than a proven status finding. The five-element exact match required by STD-AST-081-P is incomplete; specifically, the hazard-control status proof gap and PO-AST-081 exclusion block execution. Procurement may not proceed until source evidence closes these gaps.
open_blockers: PO-AST-081 not cited in action boundary mapping; PO-AST-081 required as controlling source
